scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../ai && npm run build
scripts.build:desktop:win: npm run build && cd apps/desktop && npm run build:win
scripts.build:desktop:mac: npm run build && cd apps/desktop && npm run build:mac
scripts.build:desktop:linux: npm run build && cd apps/desktop && npm run build:linux
scripts.build:desktop:all: npm run build && cd apps/desktop && npm run build:all
scripts.build:android: npm run build:web && cd apps/mobile && npm run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:android:win: npm run build:web && cd apps/mobile && npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios: npm run build:web && cd apps/mobile && npm run sync:ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:packages: cd packages/shared && npm test && cd ../ai && npm test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:packages && npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/web/dist services/api/dist packages/*/dist apps/desktop/dist apps/mobile/android/app/build
scripts.install:all: cd packages/shared && npm install && cd ../ai && npm install && cd ../../services/api && npm install && cd ../../apps/web && npm install && cd ../desktop && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
